transactions: June 5, 1979:Drafted by theMilwaukee Brewersin the20th roundof the 1979 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 3, 1980:Drafted by theKansas City Royalsin the7th roundof the 1980 amateur draft. Player signed June 15, 1980.

January 18, 1985:Traded as part of a 4-team trade by theKansas City Royalsto theTexas Rangers.  TheNew York MetssentTim Learyto theMilwaukee Brewers.  TheMilwaukee BrewerssentJim Sundbergto theKansas City Royals.  TheTexas Rangerssent a player to be named later andDanny Darwinto theMilwaukee Brewers.  TheKansas City RoyalssentFrank Willsto theNew York Mets. TheTexas RangerssentBill Hance(minors) (January 30, 1985) to theMilwaukee Brewersto complete the trade.
November 2, 1987:Traded by theTexas Rangersto theNew York Yankeesfor a player to be named later. TheNew York YankeessentBrad Arnsberg(November 10, 1987) to theTexas Rangersto complete the trade.
December 4, 1989:Traded by theNew York Yankeesto thePittsburgh PiratesforJeff RobinsonandWillie Smith.
December 19, 1990:Signed as a Free Agent with thePittsburgh Pirates.
January 2, 1996:Signed as a Free Agent with theCincinnati Reds.
February 29, 1996:Purchased by theCalifornia Angelsfrom theCincinnati Reds.

August 31, 1996:Traded by theCalifornia Angelsto theChicago White Soxfor unknown compensation. TheChicago White SoxsentScott Vollmer(minors) (November 14, 1996) to theAnaheim Angelsto complete the trade.
December 23, 1996:Signed as a Free Agent with theSan Diego Padres.
